location: Dropped by Warhawks in Stormveil Castle — four spawn immediately outside the door from the Rampart Tower Site of Grace. Can also drop from Warhawks at Castle Sol, Mountaintops of the Giants.
tactics: From the Rampart Tower grace in Stormveil Castle, step outside to find four Warhawks perched nearby that dive-bomb with fast talon strikes.
Base drop rate is only about 2%, so expect to rest and re-farm the same four hawks repeatedly.
A second, later-game farming spot exists at Castle Sol in the Mountaintops of the Giants.
lore: A blade adapted from the talon-blades strapped to war-trained hawks, kept thin and light so as not to hamper the bird's flight — repurposed here into a fast, agile weapon for human hands.

builds.name: Pure Dex poke
builds.why: D Strength / C Dexterity scaling makes it one of the more Dexterity-leaning straight swords, well suited to a fast poke-and-punish playstyle.
